positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a bioluminescent forest at night. The main subject is a grouping of stylized, geometric trees with glowing sap and oversized, ethereal flora. The scene should utilize strong contrast with deep midnight blues, vibrant cyan, and neon emerald green accents. The aesthetic should be a blend of Art Deco and modern psychedelic naturalism. Focus on clean silhouettes and bold outlines. Composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a repeating graphic tile pattern on apparel. Overhead, soft moonlight filters through the canopy, creating dramatic dappled lighting. The overall mood is mystical and serene. Vector art quality, UHD, graphic illustration, flat design with depth.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, photo, photograph, gradient wash, realism, logos, trademarks, cartoon, dirty
